docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM TJ SCOTT OKAMOTO. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER EVANGELISTA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANNIE DU CHAN IS PRESENT, DEFENDANT IS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE LANGUAGE INTERPRETER - DORTHY WONG, CERTIFICATION # 300601. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM:SCOTT OKAMOTO; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $790.77 FILED BY EVANGELISTA, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, ANNIE DU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY EVANGELISTA, JENNIFER CHAN, ANNIE DU
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2026 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVANGELISTA, JENNIFER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHAN, ANNIE DU STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
